inputs.titre: Ouverture de l'hôpital Al-Adudi à Bagdad

reason: The image depicts scholars in what appears to be an interior setting consistent with the description of the Al-Adudi Hospital opening in Baghdad in 982. The clothing (tunics, woolen cloaks), the presence of ancient texts, writing desks, oil lamps/candles, and the architectural style (windows) align with the time period. There are no obvious anachronisms like modern technology or clothing. However, the level of lighting and crispness of the image looks like AI generation which is anachronistic in itself. The interior seems a little too 'perfect' and clean for a historical setting, lowering the score slightly.
